title: potentilla recta proles astracanica
intro: Potentilla recta proles astracanica, also known as the Potentilla sect. Astracanica, is a plant species within the Potentilla genus, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and flavonoids. Its health benefits include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and potentially reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
